ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "default_port" INTEGER /* Default port number for the protocol */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the communication (Incoming/Outgoing) */,
  "encryption_type" TEXT /* Type of encryption used by the protocol */,
  "max_message_size" INTEGER /* Maximum message size allowed by the protocol in bytes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the protocol details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used by the service */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number used by the service */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the communication (Incoming/Outgoing) */,
  "customization_guide" TEXT /* Guide on how to customize the service */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the service details were updated */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies required for the service to function properly */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customization guide for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES customization_guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint being deployed */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service used for deployment */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the deployment occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "deployment_type" TEXT /* Type of deployment (e.g., On-premises, Cloud) */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the deployment details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endpoint */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the endpoint */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the endpoint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the endpoint (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the endpoint */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the endpoint */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the endpoint details were updated */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the endpoint (e.g., department, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customization_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customization guide */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the guide */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the guide */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the customization guide */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the customization guide */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the guide was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the guide is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network traffic entry */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint generating the network traffic */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used in the network traffic */,
  "traffic_date" TEXT /* Date when the network traffic was observed */,
  "traffic_volume" REAL /* Volume of the network traffic in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the network traffic (e.g., Normal, Suspicious) */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source of the traffic */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the destination of the traffic */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the source of the traffic */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the destination of the traffic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the traffic details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., Compliant, Non-compliant) */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the compliance check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the compliance check */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the compliance details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the policy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the policy was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the policy is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)
